headline: NTRS Q1 Deep Dive: AI Investment, Wealth Hiring, and Deposit Momentum Define Start to Year
summary: Financial services company Northern Trust (NASDAQ:NTRS) reported revenue ahead of Wall Street’s expectations in Q1 CY2026, with sales up 13.8% year on year to $2.21 billion. Its non-GAAP profit of $2.71 per share was 16.5% above analysts’ consensus estimates.
